meta.title: The Purdue Model in a Private LTE & 5G World
meta.description: Abdullah Yousif of pulp and paper company Georgia-Pacific shares the details of the challenges and lessons learned in deploying a high performance and secure private LTE & 5G system for their OT / mobile vehicle environment. Abdullah highlights how this new network mapped to the Purdue Reference Model.
